scripts.dev:exfos: VITE_LEAGUE_TITLE_ABBR=exFOS VITE_LEAGUE_TITLE='2025-26 season' VITE_SHOW_DASHBOARD_PLAYOFF=true npm run dev
scripts.dev: node scripts/build-team-logos-webp.mjs && node scripts/fetch-league-if-needed.mjs && node scripts/copy-data.js && node scripts/prune-stale-draft-picks.mjs && node scripts/build-waiver-gw-analytics.mjs && node scripts/build-player-contributions-archive.mjs && node scripts/build-draft-picks.mjs && vite
scripts.build: node scripts/build-team-logos-webp.mjs && node scripts/fetch-league-if-needed.mjs && node scripts/copy-data.js && node scripts/prune-stale-draft-picks.mjs && node scripts/build-waiver-gw-analytics.mjs && node scripts/build-player-contributions-archive.mjs && node scripts/build-draft-picks.mjs && vite build && node scripts/write-deploy-check.mjs && node scripts/postbuild-gh-pages.mjs
scripts.test: node --test src/playerContributionEvents.test.js src/fotmobPremTimeline.test.js src/fotmobPremWindow.test.js src/espnPremTimeline.test.js src/espnPremWindow.test.js src/useLiveScoresGamesLeft.test.js src/fplAutosubProjection.test.js
scripts.deploy: npm run build && npx gh-pages -d dist
